title: Smart Foxes
description:
In vanilla, foxes' eyes look very silly. This simple resource pack changes foxes' eyes to make them look normal. Fox texture in 32x32 or 64x64 resolution

By the way, I love Foxes :3
body:
We all know that most mobs have stupid eye textures. However, I (and many others) do not like this style of eyes on foxes. I would like to see them more concentrated.
Moreover, I made this texture in a resolution of **32x32** or **64x64**, so that you can enjoy it with **Faithful 32x32** or **Faithful 64x64**
